channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - website
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 9ead605 Update pipeline visualization to show only final states (COMPLETED/FAILED/CACHED
  • 2b5cabe Move download buttons to sidebar and add pipeline tree visualization
  • da54833 Add Nextflow pipeline tree visualization and grayscale PDF/A with embedded parqu
  • dd00a4a Fix Open Data page title and add PDF/A export with parquet
  • 4feb553 fix: update navigation labels for analysis and open data pages

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
